functions.title: Guide Book #64
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #64§r
§lMoss Mushlings§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Passive
•§lMob type§r: Mushling, Myconid, Nature-elemental, Magical.
•§lSpawns in§r: Mosshroom Cave
•§lHealth§r: 12 §o(Wild)§r

22 §o(Tamed)§r
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Azalea, Flowering Azalea.
•§lHealed by§r: Azalea, Flowering Azalea.
•§lBreed with§r: Azalea
•§lAging by§r: Azalea, Flowering Azalea.

•§lTamed by§r: Flowering Azalea
•§lPossible drops§r: Mosshroom Fungus, XP Orbs.
•They can release a §lPoison Effect§r around themselves after being hit.
•They can sleep during the day.
•Wild Mushling can randomly sit.

•Tamed Mushling can be sat down.
•Tamed Moss Mushling can randomly spawn a §lMosshroom Fungus§r.
•They can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.

§lDescription§r:
§‘The Moss Mushling is a gentle, mushroom-like creature that thrives in the tranquil depths of the Mosshroom Caves. With a body infused with nature magic, it prefers peace but will emit a poisonous burst when harmed.

§‘Tamed with a Flowering Azalea, this sleepy little being becomes a loyal companion that can occasionally produce rare Mosshroom Fungus. Whether resting to heal or dozing in the daylight, the Moss Mushling brings a calm, mystical charm to the cavernous
